# Current Capability Manifest

Process filter: `all`

This file is generated from `@CapabilityManifestProvider(...)` metadata. The manifest code is the source of truth.

## Runtime Config IDs

`CAPABILITY_DISABLED_IDS`, `CAPABILITY_KILL_SWITCH_IDS`, and `CAPABILITY_OPERATION_DISABLED_KEYS` should reference the IDs below.

- `ai.local-mock` - AI Local Mock Provider (technical; worker)
- `ai.openai` - OpenAI Provider (technical; worker)
- `ai.queue` - AI Queue (technical; api, worker)
- `ai.qwen` - Qwen Provider (technical; worker)
- `notification.email` - Notification Email (technical; api, worker)
- `notification.email.sendmail` - Notification Email Sendmail Provider (technical; worker)
- `platform.account` - Platform Account (platform; api, worker)
- `platform.auth` - Platform Auth (platform; api, worker)
- `third-party-auth.weapp` - WeApp Third-party Auth (technical; api)
